CustomSql.Name: AvgMTTRTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT (
            date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month'
        )::date AS prev_month_start,
        (current_date - INTERVAL '1 MONTH')::date AS prev_month_current,
        date_trunc('month', current_date)::date AS this_month_start,
        current_date::date AS this_month_current
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.prev_month_start AS prev_month_start,
    cteDate.prev_month_current AS prev_month_current,
    cteDate.this_month_start AS curr_month_start,
    cteDate.this_month_current AS curr_month_current,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            AVG(
                CASE
                    WHEN dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
                    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
                    AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL
                    AND aed.environment = 'prod' THEN CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600
                END
            ),
            4
        ),
        0
    ) AS all_prev_month_mttr,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            AVG(
                CASE
                    WHEN dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.this_month_start
                    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
                    AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL
                    AND aed.environment = 'prod' THEN CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600
                END
            ),
            4
        ),
        0
    ) AS all_current_month_mttr,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            AVG(
                CASE
                    WHEN dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
                    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
                    AND c.is_critical = 'true'
                    AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL
                    AND aed.environment = 'prod' THEN CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600
                END
            ),
            4
        ),
        0
    ) AS critical_prev_month_mttr,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            AVG(
                CASE
                    WHEN dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.this_month_start
                    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
                    AND c.is_critical = 'true'
                    AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL
                    AND aed.environment = 'prod' THEN CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600
                END
            ),
            4
        ),
        0
    ) AS critical_current_month_mttr
FROM flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN flowsource.apm_event_data AS aed ON c.appid = aed.appid
    CROSS JOIN cteDate
GROUP BY cteDate.prev_month_start,
    ctedate.prev_month_current,
    ctedate.this_month_start,
    ctedate.this_month_current

CustomSql.Name: AvgResilienceMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
   FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
),
cteResilience AS (
    SELECT
        c.appid,
        ard.resilience_score,
        c.is_critical,
        dateadd(second, ard.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')::date AS assessment_date,
        ard.assesment_start_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(second, ard.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')) ORDER BY ard.assesment_start_time DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN
        flowsource.apm_resilience_data AS ard ON c.appid = ard.appid AND ard.appid IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    CONCAT(LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')) AS report_date,
    COALESCE(ROUND(CASE WHEN res.is_critical='true' THEN CAST(res.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4)) END, 4), 0) AS avg_resilience_critical,
    COALESCE(ROUND(CAST(res.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4)),4), 0) AS avg_resilience_all,
    dateadd(second,  res.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')::date AS assessment_date
FROM
    cteDate
LEFT JOIN
    cteResilience AS res ON res.assessment_date >= cteDate.start_date AND res.assessment_date <= cteDate.end_date AND res.rn = 1

CustomSql.Name: DeployFreqAppWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT 
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
    FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    cpd.build_status,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number))/6.00 AS AvgCountLast6Months
FROM 
    cteDate
CROSS JOIN 
    flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN 
    flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data AS cpd ON c.appid = cpd.appid AND dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date AND cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    cpd.build_status

CustomSql.Name: AvgReleaseTimeAppWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH build_date AS (
    SELECT
        c.appid,
        c.app_name,
        c.is_critical,
        DATE(
            TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + cpdd.build_timestamp / 1000 * INTERVAL '1 second'
        ) AS build_date,
        (
            cpdd.build_timestamp - LAG(cpdd.build_timestamp) OVER (
                PARTITION BY cpdd.appid
                ORDER BY
                    cpdd.build_timestamp
            )
        ) / 86400000.00 AS date_diff_in_days
    FROM
        flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data AS cpdd
        JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c ON cpdd.appid = c.appid
),
build_date_formatted AS (
    SELECT
        appid,
        app_name,
        is_critical,
        TO_CHAR(build_date, 'MM-YYYY') AS build_date_formatted,
        date_diff_in_days
    FROM
        build_date
    WHERE
        build_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '5 months'
),
avg_release AS (
    SELECT
        appid,
        app_name,
        is_critical,
        build_date_formatted,
        AVG(date_diff_in_days) release_time
    FROM
        build_date_formatted
    GROUP BY
        appid,
        app_name,
        is_critical,
        build_date_formatted
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    appid,
    app_name,
    is_critical,
    SUM(release_time) / 6 AS avg_release_time
FROM
    avg_release
GROUP BY
    appid,
    app_name,
    is_critical

CustomSql.Name: ChangesDelivMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
   FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    CONCAT(LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')) AS report_date,
    COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.is_critical='true' THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key) END),0) AS CriticalAppCount,
    COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key)),0) AS TotalAppCount
FROM
    cteDate
CROSS JOIN
    flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN
    flowsource.alm_changes_data AS acd ON c.appid = acd.appid AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date AND acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    cteDate.start_date,cteDate.end_date

CustomSql.Name: TotalCriticalAppsCount
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_critical = 'false' OR is_critical = 'true' THEN appid END) AS TotalAppCount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_critical = 'true' THEN appid END) AS CriticalAppCount
FROM flowsource.catalog_data

CustomSql.Name: GeoWiseDistribution - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT dateadd(month, - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(
            day,
            -1,
            dateadd(
                month,
                1 - s.a,
                date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)
            )
        )::date AS end_date
    FROM (
            SELECT 0 a
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 4
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 5
        ) s
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    c.is_critical,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            AVG(CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600),
            2
        ),
        0
    ) AS all_avg_mttr,
    cp.region,
    cp.location,
    cp.latitude,
    cp.longitude,
    cp.cloud_platform,
    c.appid,
    c.app_name
FROM cteDate
    CROSS JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN flowsource.apm_event_data AS aed ON c.appid = aed.appid
    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date
    AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date
    AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL
    AND aed.environment = 'prod'
    RIGHT JOIN flowsource.cloud_provider_location_data AS cp ON JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(c.annotations, 'flowsource/app-hosted-region') = cp.region AND cp.location IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.is_critical,
    cp.region,
    cp.location,
    cp.latitude,
    cp.longitude,
    cp.cloud_platform,
    c.appid,
    c.app_name

HAVING all_avg_mttr > 0

CustomSql.Name: SASTAppWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT dateadd(month, - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(
            day,
            -1,
            dateadd(
                month,
                1 - s.a,
                date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)
            )
        )::date AS end_date
    FROM (
            SELECT 0 a
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 4
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 5
        ) s
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cmd.scan_id) / 6.00 AS AvgCountLast6Months
FROM cteDate
    CROSS JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN flowsource.codequality_metrics_data AS cmd ON c.appid = cmd.appid
    AND cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.start_date
    AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.end_date
    AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical
    HAVING
    AvgCountLast6Months > 0

CustomSql.Name: SASTMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT dateadd(month, - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(
            day,
            -1,
            dateadd(
                month,
                1 - s.a,
                date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)
            )
        )::date AS end_date
    FROM (
            SELECT 0 a
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 4
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 5
        ) s
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
 cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    CONCAT(
        LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),
        TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')
    ) AS report_date,
    COALESCE(
        COUNT(
            DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN c.is_critical = 'true' THEN cmd.scan_id
            END
        ),
        0
    ) AS CriticalAppCount,
    COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT cmd.scan_id), 0) AS TotalAppCount
FROM cteDate
    CROSS JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN flowsource.codequality_metrics_data AS cmd ON c.appid = cmd.appid
    AND cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.start_date
    AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.end_date
    AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cteDate.start_date,
    cteDate.end_date

CustomSql.Name: AvgReleaseTimeMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT dateadd(MONTH, - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)) AS start_date,
        dateadd(
            DAY,
            -1,
            dateadd(
                MONTH,
                1 - s.a,
                date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)
            )
        ) AS end_date
    FROM (
            SELECT 0 a
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 4
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 5
        ) s
),
previous_build AS (
    SELECT appid,
        build_timestamp,
        LAG(build_timestamp) OVER (
            PARTITION BY appid
            ORDER BY build_timestamp
        ) AS previous_build_timestamp,
        build_number,
        LAG(build_number) OVER (
            PARTITION BY appid
            ORDER BY build_timestamp
        ) AS previous_build_number
    FROM flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data
),
release_time AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT DATE(
            TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + build_timestamp / 1000 * INTERVAL '1 second'
        ) AS build_date,
        CASE
            WHEN c.is_critical = 'true' THEN (build_timestamp - previous_build_timestamp) / 86400000.00
            ELSE NULL
        END AS release_time_critical_apps,
        (build_timestamp - previous_build_timestamp) / 86400000.00 AS release_time_all_app
    FROM previous_build AS cpdd
        JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c ON cpdd.appid = c.appid
    WHERE build_number <> previous_build_number
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    COALESCE(AVG(release_time_critical_apps), 0) AS avg_release_time_critical_apps,
    COALESCE(AVG(release_time_all_app), 0) AS avg_release_time_all_app
FROM cteDate
    LEFT JOIN release_time AS rt ON build_date >= cteDate.start_date
    AND build_date <= cteDate.end_date
GROUP BY cteDate.start_date,
    cteDate.end_date

CustomSql.Name: DeployFreqMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
   FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    CONCAT(LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')) AS report_date,
COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.is_critical='true' THEN CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number) END),0) AS CriticalAppCount,
COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number)),0) AS TotalAppCount
FROM
cteDate
CROSS JOIN
flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN
flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data AS cpd 
ON c.appid = cpd.appid AND dateadd(second,(cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second,(cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date AND cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
cteDate.start_date,cteDate.end_date

CustomSql.Name: ChangesDelivAppWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT 
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
    FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key))/6.00 AS AvgCountLast6Months
FROM 
    cteDate
CROSS JOIN 
    flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN 
    flowsource.alm_changes_data AS acd ON c.appid = acd.appid AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date AND acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical

CustomSql.Name: DeployFreqTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month')::date AS prev_month_start,
        (current_date - INTERVAL '1 MONTH')::date AS prev_month_current,
        date_trunc('month', current_date)::date AS this_month_start,
        current_date::date AS this_month_current
)

SELECT

    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate. prev_month_start AS prev_month_start,
   cteDate. prev_month_current AS prev_month_current,
   cteDate. this_month_start AS curr_month_start,
   cteDate. this_month_current AS curr_month_current,

 COUNT(DISTINCT
       CASE WHEN 
       dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start AND                  
       dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current AND 
       cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL  
       THEN CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number) 
       END) AS all_prev_month_count,
 COUNT(DISTINCT
       CASE WHEN 
    dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01') :: date >= cteDate.this_month_start AND 
    dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
    AND cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL  
   THEN 
   CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number)  END) AS all_current_month_count,
   
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start AND dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current AND c.is_critical = 'true'  AND cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL  THEN CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number)  END) AS critical_prev_month_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.this_month_start AND dateadd(second, (cpd.build_timestamp)/1000, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current AND c.is_critical = 'true' AND cpd.appid IS NOT NULL AND cpd.build_number IS NOT NULL  THEN CONCAT(cpd.appid,cpd.build_number)  END) AS critical_current_month_count
FROM
flowsource.catalog_data  AS c
LEFT JOIN
    flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data AS cpd ON c.appid = cpd.appid
CROSS JOIN
 cteDate

GROUP BY 
cteDate.prev_month_start,ctedate.prev_month_current,ctedate.this_month_start,ctedate.this_month_current

CustomSql.Name: SASTTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT (
            date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month'
        )::date AS prev_month_start,
        (current_date - INTERVAL '1 MONTH')::date AS prev_month_current,
        date_trunc('month', current_date)::date AS this_month_start,
        current_date::date AS this_month_current
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.prev_month_start AS prev_month_start,
    cteDate.prev_month_current AS prev_month_current,
    cteDate.this_month_start AS curr_month_start,
    cteDate.this_month_current AS curr_month_current,
    COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
            AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
            AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL THEN Cmd.scan_id
        END
    ) AS all_prev_month_count,
    COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.this_month_start
            AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
            AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL THEN Cmd.scan_id
        END
    ) AS all_current_month_count,
    COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
            AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
            AND c.is_critical = 'true'
            AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL THEN cmd.scan_id
        END
    ) AS critical_prev_month_count,
    COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN cmd.scan_date::date >= cteDate.this_month_start
            AND cmd.scan_date::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
            AND c.is_critical = 'true'
            AND cmd.appid IS NOT NULL THEN cmd.scan_id
        END
    ) AS critical_current_month_count
FROM flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN flowsource.codequality_metrics_data AS cmd ON c.appid = cmd.appid
    CROSS JOIN cteDate
GROUP BY cteDate.prev_month_start,
    ctedate.prev_month_current,
    ctedate.this_month_start,
    ctedate.this_month_current

CustomSql.Name: AvgResilienceTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT 
        (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month')::date AS prev_month_start,
        (current_date - INTERVAL '1 MONTH')::date AS prev_month_current,
        date_trunc('month', current_date)::date AS this_month_start,
        current_date::date AS this_month_current
),
cteResilience AS (
    SELECT
        c.appid,
        ard.resilience_score,
        c.is_critical,
        dateadd(second, ard.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')::date AS assessment_date,
        ard.assesment_start_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.appid, date_trunc('MONTH', dateadd(second, ard.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')) ORDER BY ard.assesment_start_time DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN
        flowsource.apm_resilience_data AS ard ON c.appid = ard.appid WHERE ard.appid IS NOT NULL
),
cteLatestResilience AS (
    SELECT 
        appid,
        resilience_score,
        is_critical,
        assessment_date,
        rn
    FROM 
        cteResilience
    WHERE 
        rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.prev_month_start AS prev_month_start,
    cteDate.prev_month_current AS prev_month_current,
    cteDate.this_month_start AS curr_month_start,
    cteDate.this_month_current AS curr_month_current,
    MAX(
        COALESCE(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
                    AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
                    THEN CAST(lr.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4))
                END,
                4
            ),
            0
        )
    ) AS all_prev_month_resilience,
    MAX(
        COALESCE(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.this_month_start
                    AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.this_month_current
                    THEN CAST(lr.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4))
                END,
                4
            ),
            0
        )
    ) AS all_current_month_resilience,
    MAX(
        COALESCE(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.prev_month_start
                    AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.prev_month_current
                    AND lr.is_critical = 'true'
                    THEN CAST(lr.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4))
                END,
                4
            ),
            0
        )
    ) AS critical_prev_month_resilience,
    MAX(
        COALESCE(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.this_month_start
                    AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.this_month_current
                    AND lr.is_critical = 'true'
                    THEN CAST(lr.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4))
                END,
                4
            ),
            0
        )
    ) AS critical_current_month_resilience
FROM
    cteDate
LEFT JOIN
    cteLatestResilience AS lr ON (lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.prev_month_start AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.prev_month_current)
    OR (lr.assessment_date >= cteDate.this_month_start AND lr.assessment_date <= cteDate.this_month_current)
GROUP BY 
    cteDate.prev_month_start, 
    cteDate.prev_month_current, 
    cteDate.this_month_start, 
    cteDate.this_month_current

CustomSql.Name: AvgReleaseTimeTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH deployment_data AS (
    SELECT catalog.is_critical,
        DATE(
            TIMESTAMP 'epoch' + deployment.build_timestamp / 1000 * INTERVAL '1 second'
        ) AS build_date,
        (
            deployment.build_timestamp - LAG(deployment.build_timestamp) OVER (
                PARTITION BY deployment.appid
                ORDER BY deployment.build_timestamp
            )
        ) / 86400000.00 AS days_between_deployments
    FROM flowsource.ci_prod_deployment_data AS deployment
        JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS catalog ON deployment.appid = catalog.appid
),
average_last_month AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN build_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
                AND DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day' THEN days_between_deployments
            END
        ) AS avg_days_between_total_apps_last_month,
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN is_critical = 'true'
                AND build_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
                AND DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day' THEN days_between_deployments
            END
        ) AS avg_days_between_critical_apps_last_month
    FROM deployment_data
),
average_this_month AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN build_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE THEN days_between_deployments
            END
        ) AS avg_days_between_total_apps_this_month,
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN is_critical = 'true'
                AND build_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE THEN days_between_deployments
            END
        ) AS avg_days_between_critical_apps_this_month
    FROM deployment_data
)
SELECT 
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    COALESCE(
        this_month.avg_days_between_total_apps_this_month,
        0
    ) AS avg_days_between_total_apps_this_month,
    COALESCE(
        this_month.avg_days_between_critical_apps_this_month,
        0
    ) AS avg_days_between_critical_apps_this_month,
    COALESCE(
        last_month.avg_days_between_total_apps_last_month,
        0
    ) AS avg_days_between_total_apps_last_month,
    COALESCE(
        last_month.avg_days_between_critical_apps_last_month,
        0
    ) AS avg_days_between_critical_apps_last_month
FROM average_last_month AS last_month,
    average_this_month AS this_month

CustomSql.Name: AvgMTTRMonthWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
   FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate.start_date AS report_start_date,
    cteDate.end_date AS report_end_date,
    CONCAT(LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')) AS report_date,
    COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN c.is_critical='true' THEN CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600 END), 2), 0) AS avg_MTTR_critical,
    COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600), 2), 0) AS avg_MTTR_all
FROM
    cteDate
CROSS JOIN
    flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN
    flowsource.apm_event_data AS aed ON c.appid = aed.appid AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL AND aed.environment = 'prod'
GROUP BY
    cteDate.start_date,cteDate.end_date

CustomSql.Name: ChangesDelivTrend - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT
        (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month')::date AS prev_month_start,
        (current_date - INTERVAL '1 MONTH')::date AS prev_month_current,
        date_trunc('month', current_date)::date AS this_month_start,
        current_date::date AS this_month_current
)

SELECT

    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    cteDate. prev_month_start AS prev_month_start,
   cteDate. prev_month_current AS prev_month_current,
   cteDate. this_month_start AS curr_month_start,
   cteDate. this_month_current AS curr_month_current,

 COUNT(DISTINCT
       CASE WHEN 
       dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start AND                  
       dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current AND 
       acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL 
       THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key) 
       END) AS all_prev_month_count,
 COUNT(DISTINCT
       CASE WHEN 
    dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01') :: date >= cteDate.this_month_start AND 
    dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current
    AND acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL 
   THEN 
   CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key)  END) AS all_current_month_count,
   
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.prev_month_start AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.prev_month_current AND c.is_critical = 'true'  AND acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key)  END) AS critical_prev_month_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.this_month_start AND dateadd(second, acd.done_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.this_month_current AND c.is_critical = 'true' AND acd.appid IS NOT NULL AND acd.project_key IS NOT NULL AND acd.issue_key IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(acd.appid,acd.project_key),acd.issue_key)  END) AS critical_current_month_count
FROM
flowsource.catalog_data  AS c
LEFT JOIN
    flowsource.alm_changes_data AS acd ON c.appid = acd.appid
CROSS JOIN
 cteDate
GROUP BY 
cteDate.prev_month_start,ctedate.prev_month_current,ctedate.this_month_start,ctedate.this_month_current

CustomSql.Name: AvgMTTRlobWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT 
        dateadd(month, -s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(day, -1, dateadd(month, 1 - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)))::date AS end_date
    FROM (
        SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL
        SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5
    ) s
)
SELECT
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    CONCAT(LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')) AS report_date,
    c.lob,
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CAST(aed.recovery_time AS DECIMAL) / 3600), 4), 0)/6
 AS AvgMTTRLast6Months
FROM 
    cteDate
CROSS JOIN 
    flowsource.catalog_data AS c
LEFT JOIN 
    flowsource.apm_event_data AS aed ON c.appid = aed.appid AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date AND dateadd(second, aed.event_date, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date  AND aed.appid IS NOT NULL AND aed.environment = 'prod'
GROUP BY 
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    report_date,
    c.lob
HAVING 
    AvgMTTRLast6Months > 0

CustomSql.Name: AvgResilienceAppWise - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
WITH cteDate AS (
    SELECT dateadd(month, - s.a, date_trunc('MONTH', current_date))::date AS start_date,
        dateadd(
            day,
            -1,
            dateadd(
                month,
                1 - s.a,
                date_trunc('MONTH', current_date)
            )
        )::date AS end_date
    FROM (
            SELECT 0 a
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 4
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 5
        ) s
),
cteResilience AS (
    SELECT
        ard.appid,
        ard.resilience_score,
        ard.assesment_start_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ard.appid ORDER BY ard.assesment_start_time DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        flowsource.apm_resilience_data AS ard
    WHERE
        ard.appid IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,
    CONCAT(
        LEFT(to_char(cteDate.start_date, 'Month'), 3),
        TO_CHAR(cteDate.start_date, ' YYYY')
    ) AS report_date,
    c.lob,
    c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            CAST(res.resilience_score AS DECIMAL(30, 4)) / 6,
            4
        ),
        0
    ) AS AvgResilienceLast6Months
FROM cteDate
    CROSS JOIN flowsource.catalog_data AS c
    LEFT JOIN cteResilience AS res ON c.appid = res.appid
    AND dateadd(second, res.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')::date >= cteDate.start_date
    AND dateadd(second, res.assesment_start_time, '1970-01-01')::date <= cteDate.end_date
    AND res.rn = 1
GROUP BY c.app_name,
    c.appid,
    c.is_critical,
    report_date,
    c.lob,
    res.resilience_score
HAVING AvgResilienceLast6Months > 0

CustomSql.Name: LOBwiseAppCount - New
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT lob, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS data_refresh_date_time,COUNT(DISTINCT appid) AS appid_count, is_critical
FROM flowsource.catalog_data
GROUP BY lob,is_critical
